lead.es: El Índice de Gobierno Abierto del Índice de Ley de Justicia Mundial (WJP ROL) para Honduras registró una disminución del 3.5% en 2025, pasando de 0.52635 en 2024 a 0.507753. {{claim:cc059b2848f2934a|0.507753}}
lead.en: The World Justice Project Rule of Law Index (WJP ROL) for Honduras recorded a decrease of 3.5% in 2025, dropping from 0.52635 in 2024 to 0.507753. {{claim:cc059b2848f2934a|0.507753}}
